home.title: HKG Swimming
home.subtitle: Hong Kong swimming results, rankings, and analytics

feedback.title: Feedback & Issues
feedback.subtitle: Report bugs, request features, or share your thoughts. All submissions are public.
feedback.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the issue or suggestion in detail...
feedback.thankYou: Thank you for your feedback! It has been submitted successfully.
feedback.errorMissing: Please fill in both the subject and description.
feedback.noItems: No feedback yet. Be the first to submit!

appeals.title: Result Appeals
appeals.subtitle: Correct an incorrect result or report a missing record. All submissions require admin approval.
appeals.typeCorrectionDesc: A result in the database is incorrect and needs to be fixed.
appeals.typeMissingDesc: A result is missing from the database and should be added.
appeals.missingCompetitionPlaceholder: e.g. 2024 Long Course Age Group Champ.
appeals.reasonPlaceholder: Explain what is incorrect about this result...
appeals.missingReasonPlaceholder: Explain why this record should exist (e.g. competed but result not uploaded)...
appeals.requestedChangePlaceholder: What should the correct data be?
appeals.missingRequestedChangePlaceholder: Full details: time, place, age group, etc.
appeals.thankYou: Your appeal has been submitted and is pending review.
appeals.errorMissing: Please fill in the swimmer name, reason, and requested correction.

changelog.title: Changelog
changelog.subtitle: What's new and what's changed on HKG Swimming.

seo.siteDescription: Search Hong Kong swimming competition results, track personal bests, and explore rankings across all age groups and events.
seo.clubsDescription: Browse all registered swimming clubs in Hong Kong. View rosters, medal counts, and season performance for each club.
seo.competitionsDescription: Complete archive of Hong Kong swimming competitions — long course and short course meets, age group championships, and open events.
seo.leaderboardsDescription: Hong Kong swimming leaderboards — top times by event, gender, age group, and season. Find the fastest swimmers in Hong Kong.
seo.searchDescription: Search for swimmers, clubs, and competitions in the Hong Kong swimming database.
seo.compareDescription: Compare two Hong Kong swimmers head-to-head — side-by-side personal bests and shared competition results.
seo.trendsDescription: Discover the biggest improvers and breakthrough performances in Hong Kong swimming.
seo.feedbackDescription: Submit feedback, report bugs, or request features for HKG Swimming.
seo.changelogDescription: See what's new — recent updates, features, and fixes on HKG Swimming.
seo.swimmerDescription: {name} ({club}) — {gender} swimmer. View personal bests, race history, and competition results.
seo.competitionDescription: {name} — {date}, {course}. Full results and rankings for this Hong Kong swimming competition.
seo.clubDescription: {code} swimming club — roster, medal tally, season statistics, and stroke analysis.
